channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX IPO live updates: SPCX pops 30% after biggest IPO ever
item.description: Follow SpaceX IPO live updates on price, ticker, broker access, valuation and what investors need to know before shares trade.

item.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
item.description: Elon Musk's stake in SpaceX is worth more than $766 billion. Combined with his Tesla holdings, Musk's net worth as of Friday is roughly $1.05 trillion.

item.title: U.S. and Iran have 'final, agreed upon text' of a deal, Pakistan prime minister says
item.description: President Donald Trump earlier wrote on Truth Social that public reporting about the deal has "NOTHING to do with the terms that were agreed to, in writing."

item.title: SpaceX market cap tops $2 trillion after shares of Elon Musk's rocket company gain 30% on debut
item.description: SpaceX shares soared on Friday as trading commenced on the Nasdaq.

item.title: SpaceX 'proxies' plunge as real deal arrives: Here's where traders are buying the dip
item.description: SpaceX "proxy stocks," whose options volumes were booming ahead of Friday's historic initial public offering, are unwinding gains.

item.title: SpaceX's 'out-of-this-world' valuation supported by its rocket launch 'moat,' says Wolfe Research
item.description: SpaceX is widely recognized to have a near-monopoly for its launch business

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SpaceX, EchoStar, Adobe, Seagate Technology, Charles Schwab & more
item.description: Here are the stocks making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Judge blocks DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund for longer, wants guarantee it’s dead
item.description: A judge gave Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent a week to submit a sworn declaration the DOJ fund was not going forward.

item.title: New SpaceX millionaires are reinventing the business of managing large wealth
item.description: Wealth advisors say SpaceXers have unique ways of addressing their financial challenges, including whiteboarding, troubleshooting and AI.

item.title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors
item.description: Gwynne Shotwell, long Elon Musk's second-in-command at SpaceX, spoke exclusively with CNBC ahead of her company's highly anticipated IPO.

item.title: For Warsh as Fed chair, silence may be the point
item.description: Kevin Warsh will hold his first Fed meeting, giving markets the first public look at how he'll communicate as chair of the Federal Reserve.

item.title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
item.description: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

item.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
item.description: While SpaceX's IPO has caused alarm that it may be overvalued, some retail investors still want in.

item.title: Former star U.S. bond manager Kenneth Leech pleads guilty to obstructing 'cherry-picking' probe
item.description: Kenneth Leech, a former star bond manager at Western Asset Management, pleaded guilty on Friday to obstructing a probe into alleged "cherry-picking."

item.title: A Google AI project delay may have hurt chip stocks. But data center buildout remains on track
item.description: Computing infrastructure company Crusoe is no longer involved in a data center project being built in Wyoming.

item.title: How to get SpaceX stock — without buying the IPO
item.description: Investors will can hold SpaceX stock by virtue of owning shares in certain mutual funds and exchange-traded funds.

item.title: Oil prices fall after Pakistan says U.S. and Iran have reached final peace deal text
item.description: Oil prices fell Friday after a proposed peace deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopen was reported by Iranian state media.

item.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
item.description: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.

item.title: Appeals court upholds FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried's fraud conviction
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld the conviction of FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried, finding that the trial leading to his 25-year sentence was not unfair.

item.title: Options volume in space stocks boomed as investors look for any way 'to get long SpaceX'
item.description: "There's a ton of short-dated call buying in these names as a way to get long SpaceX," Danny Kirsch, head of options trading at Piper Sandler, said.

item.title: Jim Cramer calls this chipmaker his No. 1 stock — and sees 63% upside ahead
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: IPO investing: What are IPO stocks and the best brokers for IPO access?
item.description: Some brokerages offer IPO access before a company goes public, but anyone can buy shares once trading begins.

item.title: Meta reportedly begins dismantling $2 billion Manus deal on Beijing's orders
item.description: Meta has reportedly begun dismantling its acquisition of Manus, moving to comply with Beijing's unprecedented order to hand back the Chinese-founded AI startup.

item.title: Meta's social networks recover after brief outage
item.description: Meta's social media platforms are recovering after a brief outage that affected thousands of users on Friday.

item.title: Waymo launches premier subscription tier for $29.99 a month, starting in select cities
item.description: Waymo is offering a new subscription tier for power users, starting in San Francisco, Los Angeles and Phoenix

item.title: Ex-Andreessen Horowitz partner slams his old firm, other VCs for 'political infiltration' around AI
item.description: John O'Farrell, former partner at Andreessen Horowitz, says the PAC Leading the Future, backed by his old firm, is trying to "intimidate politicians."

item.title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
item.description: SpaceX has achieved its goal of becoming the largest IPO on record.

item.title: Trump picks former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director
item.description: Trump's announcement came after House Democrats' objections to his pick of Bill Pulte as acting chief ensured that a key national security tool expires Friday.

item.title: Warren questions SpaceX IPO oversight in new letter to stock indexes
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren seeking answers on changes to index provider waiting periods, protections for retail investors, in a letter obtained first by CNBC.

item.title: Some U.S. states still don't know if the World Cup will benefit them financially—just look at New Jersey
item.description: Millions are expected to attend 2026 World Cup matches across North America. For at least one host state, New Jersey, the tournament also brings mounting costs.
